description_long: This is a modern residential house set within a spacious, landscaped lot featuring lush green lawns and mature trees. The house itself has a clean, rectangular footprint with a mix of flat and gable roof sections, and its exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or painted concrete, with large windows providing ample natural light. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage or carport, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small porch or overhang. The landscaping is thoughtfully arranged, with garden beds, shrubs, and a variety of trees providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The house appears to be two stories tall, with the upper level partially set back, creating a dynamic roofline. The overall design is contemporary, blending functional outdoor spaces with modern architectural elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, surrounded by landscaped lawns, trees, and garden beds. The exterior features large windows, a driveway, and a small porch entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and dense landscaping with trees and shrubs framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof sections, and extensive lawn area with trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the gable roof, backyard garden beds, and additional trees providing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage or carport, more garden beds, and the transition between flat and gable roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch or overhang, single door, and steps, framed by landscaping and possibly columns or posts.
